_instructions: Add these dependencies to your existing package.json. Do not replace your full package.json — just merge these in.
_canvas_note: The 'canvas' package requires native build tools. On Ubuntu (GitHub Actions), this is handled automatically. On Windows locally, you may need to install windows-build-tools or use WSL to test the sticker generation step. The pipeline now lazy-loads canvas. If canvas is missing, it skips sticker image generation and logs a warning.
_type_note: Your package.json needs 'type': 'module' for .mjs imports to work, OR keep the file as generate-content.mjs (the .mjs extension handles it automatically without needing to change package.json type).
